evals.name: blog-post
evals.prompt: Our marketing intern drafted this blog post with ChatGPT (draft.md) and it reads SO AI-generated. Rewrite it so it sounds like a real person from our company wrote it. Keep all the actual product facts. Edit the file in place.
assertions: all facts preserved: EUR 12.50, EUR 1.80, 99.2%, founded 2019, Exact Online/Moneybird/Twinfield, 5 business days, SOC 2 Type II, 14-day trial, EUR 49/month all present and unaltered
em dashes reduced to 2 or fewer in the rewritten draft.md
zero emojis in the rewritten draft.md
buzzword purge: no 'leverage', 'delve', 'seamless', 'game-changer', 'landscape', 'unlock', 'empower', 'foster', 'pivotal', 'crucial' in the rewrite
boilerplate scaffolding gone: no 'In today's fast-paced', 'It's important to note', 'In conclusion', 'Ultimately', 'Let's dive'
rewrite is shorter than the original draft (word count)
no fabricated facts: no new numbers/claims absent from the original (bracketed author prompts allowed)

evals.name: linkedin-post
evals.prompt: This LinkedIn post (post.txt) sounds like every AI-written announcement ever. Humanize it - I'm the founder posting it under my own name. Keep the real numbers. Edit the file in place.
assertions: all facts preserved: 2 million shipments, 340+ customers, 31% ETA accuracy claim, Poland/Romania/Baltics, team 28 to 45
emoji count reduced to 2 or fewer (LinkedIn register tolerates a little, not seven)
no 'testament to', 'relentless', 'incredible/incredibly', 'groundbreaking', 'journey', 'the best is yet to come' in the rewrite
checkmark-bullet scaffolding replaced (no lines starting with a checkmark emoji)
founder voice present: first-person statements that commit to something specific rather than generic gratitude boilerplate
no fabricated facts or invented anecdotes presented as real events
